description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, rectangular layout and a flat roof. The structure is surrounded by a fenced yard featuring a driveway, green lawn, and several trees for landscaping. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the exterior walls, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The front of the bungalow includes a paved entryway and a small porch area, while the rear opens to a private backyard with a patio and pool. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the darker fencing and roof trim. The overall design emphasizes open, functional living spaces and a strong connection to the outdoors.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, fenced yard, and landscaped driveway. Features a small porch, rear patio, and pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, fenced yard, and pool area to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, side lawn, and the arrangement of windows and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio, pool, and rear-facing windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the porch, entryway, and side landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
